headline: Trump 🟠👨‍💼 PUMPS BRAKES 🚗💨 on Iran Nuke Orgy 💥🛢️!
text: Trump Daddy 🟠🦅 buying THICC TIME ⏰🍑 for Iran Mullah Cucks 🕌😩 after DIPLO FRENZY 🌀✈️ in DC! Air Force Two ✈️👨‍💼 primed to YEET VP JD Vance 🇺🇸🤠 to Islamabad 🕌🇵🇰 for US-Iran PEACE BANG 💋🕊️, but PLOT TWIST 🚫📅 – no takeoff, talks POSTPONED 😴🔄! Donnie announced CEASEFIRE EXTENDO 🔄🛑 on Truth Social 📱🔥 (his war drip since Feb 💨), cuz Pakistan mediators 🕌🤝 begged 'HOLD THAT ATTACK BUTTON 🇮🇷🚫 till mullahs cook up UNIFIED PROPOSAL 📜🍲!' Second week in a row Trump BACKS OFF 🔥❌ escalate threats, winding down this 2-month MEAT GRINDER 🥩⚔️ like a boss! Vance ghosted the trip 👻🛫, Iran played HARD TO GET 🫦🚫, leaving White House SIMPS 🤡 sweating if Tehran shows! Steve Witkoff + Jared Kushner 🕶️💼 (Vance's wingmen) dipped from Miami 🌴 to DC instead of Pak 🚀, then Vance rolled to Oval for POLICY POUND TOWN 👊📈. Trump drops: 'No timeline this time 🕰️🤷‍♂️' – way CHILLER than his past Twitter RANTS 😡📱 on ayatollah SIMPS! Ex-amby James Jeffrey 🕌📚 spills: 'No magic formula for war exits 🪄⚔️, Trump just THREATENS BIG STICKS 🪵💥 while dangling DEALS 💰 like every POTUS GOAT!' Pragmatic AF per Brian Katulis 🧠🏛️ – Iran's leadership FRACTURED 😵‍💫🕌, but this pumps UNCERTAINTY JUICE 🧃❓ on war length, gas prices PAINING MAGA bros 😩⛽, and base salty AF 🧂🇺🇸! Strait of Hormuz BLOCKADE 🛳️🚫 still THROBBING 💪 (Iran calls it WAR CRIME 😡), no lift, pressuring Tehran to BEND OVER 🔴 for nuke shutdown ☢️🚫 + proxy gang DISBAND 👻🕌 – red lines Trump WON'T BUDGE ON 📏🛑! Iran ghosts on deets, so Donnie's options slimmin' like Kushner's hairline 😂💇‍♂️ – more time bought, but PEACE BAE 🕊️💋 still PLAYIN' HARD TO GET! Global economy ROILED 🌍📉, but Trump MAGA anti-warriors 🦅😤 lovin' the de-escalate VIBES 🎉 – will ayatollahs fold or keep the ORGY GOING 💦⚔️? Stay tuned, frens 👀🔥!
